children.heading: Definition of eligible entity
children.label: a Definition of eligible entity
children.text: In this section, the term “eligible entity” means an entity described in section 2008q(a) of this title.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: To assist agricultural employers and farmworkers by improving the supply, stability, safety, and training of the agricultural labor force, the Secretary may provide grants to eligible entities for use in providing services to assist farmworkers who are citizens or otherwise legally present in the United States in securing, retaining, upgrading, or returning from agricultural jobs.

children.label: B
children.text: the provision of agricultural labor market information;

children.label: D
children.text: short-term housing while in transit to an agricultural worksite;

children.label: E
children.text: workplace literacy and assistance with English as a second language;

children.label: F
children.text: health and safety instruction, including ways of safeguarding the food supply of the United States; and

children.label: G
children.text: such other services as the Secretary determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Limitation on administrative expenses
children.label: c Limitation on administrative expenses
children.text: Not more than 15 percent of the funds made available to carry out this section for a fiscal year may be used to pay for administrative expenses.
such sums as are necessary for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2013; and
$10,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2018.
